parsed_output.justification: Justin explicitly claimed to be a werewolf during the discussion ('I'm going to go out on a leg and I'm going to say that I was a werewolf when we started'). While this could be a bluff by the Tanner or a strategy to confuse the group, it is the most direct admission of the werewolf role in the transcript. Mitchell also expressed his intention to vote for Justin, and Caitlynn's earlier claim to be the werewolf was quickly dismissed by Justin's assertion that she is the Tanner.
